title: Golden Tempo Wins Kentucky Derby, DeVaux Makes History
summary: Golden Tempo wins the Kentucky Derby with a late surge, making Cherie DeVaux the first female trainer to win the prestigious race.
charlotte_impact: DeVaux's win breaks barriers, inspiring future generations in horse racing.

title: Taiwan Leader Visits Eswatini Amid China's Opposition
summary: President Lai Ching-te visits Eswatini, meeting King Mswati III and signing trade agreements despite China's attempts to block the trip.
charlotte_impact: Highlights Taiwan's efforts to maintain diplomatic ties despite Chinese pressure.

title: Drugmakers Challenge Abortion Pill Access Restrictions
summary: Drugmakers petition the Supreme Court to restore mail access to mifepristone after a court ruling restricted in-person pickup.
charlotte_impact: Impacts access to abortion medication and raises legal questions.

title: Benavidez Stops Ramirez, Becomes Three-Division Champ
summary: David Benavidez defeats Gilberto Ramirez to claim the WBA and WBO cruiserweight titles, becoming a three-division champion.
charlotte_impact: Solidifies Benavidez's status as a top boxer in the cruiserweight division.

title: Olivia Rodrigo Mocks Jake Paul on SNL
summary: Olivia Rodrigo jokes about Jake Paul's career during her Saturday Night Live hosting gig, contrasting her music career with his boxing.
charlotte_impact: Celebrity news and pop culture commentary.

title: Suspect Arrested in Austria Over Poisoned Baby Food
summary: A 39-year-old man is arrested in Austria for allegedly attempting to blackmail a German baby food manufacturer by poisoning HiPP products.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential threats to food safety and consumer confidence.

title: Trump Reviews Iran's Offer, Expresses Doubt
summary: President Trump is reviewing a new offer from Iran to end the war but remains skeptical about its viability.
charlotte_impact: Indicates ongoing diplomatic efforts and potential for conflict resolution.

title: Washington Mother's Murder Captured on 911 Call
summary: Gloria Choi was murdered by her ex-boyfriend after repeated 911 calls reporting stalking. The attack was captured during a 911 call.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about domestic violence and the effectiveness of emergency response systems.

title: 76ers Complete 3-1 Comeback Against Boston
summary: Philadelphia 76ers defeat Boston after overcoming a 3-1 deficit, marking their first series win against Boston since 1982.
charlotte_impact: Showcases resilience and determination in sports.

title: Germany Downplays U.S. Troop Withdrawal Impact
summary: Germany's defense minister minimizes the impact of the U.S. troop withdrawal, but the move has unsettled NATO allies.
charlotte_impact: Reflects shifting alliances and concerns about European security.

title: Trump Threatens New Strikes if Iran 'Misbehaves'
summary: Trump considers ordering new military action against Iran to break the stalemate.
charlotte_impact: Escalates tensions and raises the possibility of further conflict.

title: Canes Announce Second Round Schedule
summary: Carolina Hurricanes will face Philadelphia in the second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs.

title: Attack on Portland Athletic Club, Explosives Found
summary: One person is dead, and multiple explosive devices were found after an attack on Portland's Multnomah Athletic Club.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential security threats and violence in public spaces.

title: Spirit Airlines Ceases Operations After Failed Bailout
summary: Spirit Airlines has ceased operations overnight following a failed government bailout attempt.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the financial challenges facing the airline industry.
